message:
dashboard: single exec summary per agent — live when working, last known when idle (#33)

Replace the stacked doing+status-file display with one cohesive summary:
- Agent actively working (doing set): show only the live pane signal
- Agent idle (doing empty): show last known task/progress/results from
  status file as context, not as a parallel status line

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
